name: ColorPicker
description: Fully functional color picker: draggable 2D saturation/brightness spectrum, hue slider, opacity slider, hex input, and a row of recommended preset swatches (ColorDots). Composes ColorSpectrum, ColorSliders, and ColorDots.
sourceNote: Figma shows a Hex/RGB/HSB format-switcher dropdown above the input; this is simplified to a static hex input (no format switching) to keep scope reasonable. All color math (HSV<->RGB<->hex) is implemented in colorUtils.ts.

accessibility.role: each draggable control (ColorSpectrum, ColorSliders) has role="slider" with aria-value*; keyboard arrow keys adjust ColorSliders
